Also provides hot meals. 5325 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Adults age 65 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 988-3558 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SENIOR CENTERS MULTNOMAH COUNTY SENIOR CENTER
